title: defunctionalization tag = normalized-AST hash
manager: Every function value gets a stable identity — a defunctionalization tag that is the hash of its normalized AST — so two functions that are structurally the same compare equal, and a function can be serialized, replayed, and named in a certificate. Without this, function-valued state couldn't be saved or compared at all; with it, behavior-as-data becomes as durable as any other value. The normalization is pinned forever, which is why it's an irreversibles item.
cs: defunctionalization tag = hash of the normalized AST (irreversibles #12 — spec the normalization at the lambda slice); enables equality, serialization, and replay of fn values; the normalization is pinned.
